creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Description:

I upgraded gtk-pipe-viewer/pipe-viewer to a newer version on my server before submitting the patch to the tracker and during testing I get the following error:

```
$ env DISPLAY=:15 pipe-viewer

=>> Search for YouTube videos (:h for help)
> FreeBSD
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.36/auto/IO/Compress/Brotli/Brotli.so: Undefined symbol "BrotliDecoderCreateInstance"
```

Notes:

* Bug 276501 seems to present the same problem.
